name: Alexander House at Elizabeth Square
bathroomsNote: 2BR plans include 2A1 (2BR/1BA) and 2C through 2G (2BR/2BA); multiple 2BR/2BA floor plans confirmed

notes.doorman: Multiple listing aggregators and an ApartmentRatings.com summary describe '24-hour concierge'; a lobby redesign with controlled access and on-site security is confirmed. Hours not explicitly stated on any property-managed page; 'Likely staffed' is the honest call absent first-party confirmation of 24h staffing
notes.inUnitLaundry: One resident review explicitly listed 'washer and dryer in the unit' as a key amenity; the Ascend Apartments listing also notes in-unit laundry. Listed as Yes but not confirmed across all floor plans
notes.pool: Resident reviews mention 'a very nice swimming pool with a lifeguard every day'; confirmed
notes.balcony: Resident review and Ascend Apartments listing both confirm balconies as a unit feature
notes.gym: Ascend Apartments listing confirms a 'state-of-the-art fitness center'
notes.petFriendly: Zumper shows 'not allowed'; other listing sources (Ascend) show 'cat friendly' and 'dog friendly'. Conflict between sources; verify directly with leasing office
notes.packageRoom: No explicit mention of a package room or package lockers; building has controlled access and concierge who may handle packages but this is unconfirmed
notes.unitClimate: No source specifies whether heat/AC is tenant-controlled by thermostat or switched seasonally by building management; unclear
notes.wellMaintained: ApartmentRatings.com has 101 reviews with mixed sentiment; some reviewers note helpful staff and updated lobby, others cite maintenance delays and management concerns; insufficient data to call this Yes or No
notes.buildingDetails: 16-story high-rise; 305 units; built 1992; managed by Pratumco (property manager Alexis King); owned/operated in partnership with the Housing Opportunities Commission (HOC) of Montgomery County; approximately 40% affordable units; part of Elizabeth Square development alongside Elizabeth House III and Elizabeth House IV
notes.currentSpecials: One month free rent on select homes (as of June 2026); Saturday open houses 10 AM-2 PM
